examples: Heidi did not take this for a summons, for the maid's face was scornful and forbidding.
"Oh, well!" said Catherine, with scornful compassion, "keep your secret. I'm no coward."
But everyone was scornful to it.
He is increasingly scornful of the very currency he is supposed to be defending.
Parker, characteristically, publicly displayed his scornful letter to Darrow as a lesson in humility.
